examples.name: weekly-digest-run
examples.description: Standard weekly digest run — no additional parameters needed. Agent reads knowledge base and determines what to research.

event.content: Run the weekly QSR digest for Daniels Donuts. Use the knowledge base for research priorities. Stop and surface the classified items for approval before writing the Word doc.

examples.name: competitor-focus-run
examples.description: Focus this week's digest on a specific competitor event.

event.content: Run the weekly QSR digest with a focus on Krispy Kreme AU — there may be news about their Hungry Jack's rollout expanding. Still cover other standing priorities. Stop for approval before writing.

examples.name: board-pack-run
examples.description: Board-only digest — filters to Board and Both items only.

event.content: Run the QSR digest but produce a Board-only version — include only items classified as Board or Both. Output as ./out/qsr-digest-board-[date].docx.
